name: Cherry Breeze Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 butter crust pie crust; or graham cracker pie crust, 9 inch
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the Cool Whip thoroughly.
2. Soften the cream cheese.
3. Whisk together all ingredients.
4. Fill the crust (a butter crust is preferable) and refrigerate for several hours.
5. Top with desired fruit topping (cherries are recommended).
